identity.philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King.

secondary.name: Emerald Growth
secondary.usage: Success States, Rent Paid, Positive Trends

dashboard_structure.sidebar: w-64 fixed h-full bg-primary text-white hidden md:block
dashboard_structure.header: sticky top-0 z-40 w-full backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-neutral-border

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border border-neutral-border hover:bg-neutral-background shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 transition-all

cards.style: bg-white border border-neutral-border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200 rounded-lg p-6
cards.header: flex justify-between items-center mb-4 border-b border-neutral-border/50 pb-2

inputs.style: bg-white border border-neutral-border focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm transition-all placeholder:text-neutral-text_tertiary

status_badges.success: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-200 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
status_badges.warning: bg-orange-50 text-orange-700 border border-orange-200 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
status_badges.error: bg-red-50 text-red-700 border border-red-200 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
status_badges.neutral: bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

login_background.usage: Full screen background for login/register pages with overlay

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure text meets APCA standards. Use text-slate-900 on light backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Outfit' font for all Headings (h1-h3) and 'Inter' for body text.
Implement the 'Bento Grid' layout for the dashboard overview.
Use the defined color palette strictly. Do not use default Tailwind colors like 'blue-500' directly; use the semantic names or the specific hex codes provided.
Ensure all interactive elements have the defined hover and focus states.
Use the provided image URLs for the login page and property cards.
Do not use gradients for backgrounds unless specified in the 'visual_enhancers' section.
Keep the design clean, professional, and high-contrast.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetic (generic centered layouts, uniform styling).
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for headers/overlays.
Do NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all).
Do NOT center align the app container.
Use modern button styles (pill-shaped or sharp).
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters as icons.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
